aliases: organic cotton; recycled cotton; cotton fabric
repair_notes: Repairable through sewing, patching, and restitching.
end_of_life_notes: Biodegradable in some conditions, but recycling depends on fabric blends and contamination.
risk_notes: Lower durability if thin or blended with unknown fibres.

aliases: PET textile; recycled polyester; polyester fabric
repair_notes: Can be sewn and patched, but heat damage and fraying may reduce repair quality.
end_of_life_notes: Technically recyclable in some systems, but often downcycled or landfilled.
risk_notes: Can shed microfibres and is less biodegradable.

repair_notes: Durable and repairable through stitching, patching, and component replacement.
end_of_life_notes: Recyclability depends on local textile recycling infrastructure.
preferred_use: Bags, straps, outdoor accessories, technical garments
risk_notes: Harder to recycle when blended or coated.

aliases: genuine leather; full-grain leather; leather trim
repair_notes: Highly repairable through stitching, conditioning, patching, and hardware replacement.
end_of_life_notes: Difficult to recycle due to tanning, coatings, and mixed construction.
risk_notes: High environmental burden if overused; repairability depends on construction quality.

repair_notes: Repairability varies; soles and gaskets can be replaced if mechanically attached.
end_of_life_notes: Often difficult to recycle in consumer products due to additives and bonding.
risk_notes: Bonded rubber parts often make repair difficult.

aliases: li-ion battery; lithium battery; rechargeable battery
repair_notes: Should be designed as a replaceable module with safe access.
end_of_life_notes: Requires specialist recycling and safe handling.
risk_notes: Major replacement driver when glued, sealed, or proprietary.

aliases: display glass; tempered glass; cover glass
repair_notes: Replaceable if the display/screen assembly is modular and not glued.
end_of_life_notes: Recycling depends on coatings, adhesives, and mixed display layers.
risk_notes: High waste risk if fused to expensive assemblies.

aliases: printed circuit board; circuit board; electronics board
repair_notes: Repairability improves if boards are modular, documented, and connector-based.
end_of_life_notes: Specialist e-waste recycling required due to mixed metals, resins, and components.
risk_notes: Hard to repair if fully potted, undocumented, or proprietary.

repair_notes: Repairable when enclosures are screwed or clipped rather than glued.
end_of_life_notes: Recyclable in some systems if clearly identified and not mixed.
risk_notes: Lower circularity when painted, coated, glued, or mixed with unknown plastics.

repair_notes: Durable housing material when mechanical fasteners support access.
end_of_life_notes: Recyclability depends on identification, additives, and local infrastructure.
preferred_use: Durable casings, transparent covers, impact-resistant parts
risk_notes: Can be difficult to recycle if blended or coated.

repair_notes: Durable and recyclable; repairability depends on fasteners and modularity.
end_of_life_notes: Widely recyclable if separated from mixed assemblies.
risk_notes: Repair value drops if permanently bonded to mixed materials.

repair_notes: Often recoverable in motors, cables, and wiring if assemblies can be opened.
risk_notes: Difficult to recover if embedded in sealed assemblies.

repair_notes: Strong, durable, and suitable for replaceable fasteners or structural parts.
preferred_use: Screws, blades, frames, hinges, appliance parts
risk_notes: Corrosion risk if wrong grade is used in wet conditions.

repair_notes: Good for replaceable gaskets, seals, and grips.
end_of_life_notes: Limited recycling pathways for consumer silicone parts.
risk_notes: Should be replaceable because worn seals can make a whole product fail.

aliases: generic plastic; unspecified plastic; plastic blend
repair_notes: Repairability is uncertain without a specified material type.
end_of_life_notes: Difficult to recycle when plastic type is unknown.
preferred_use: Avoid where possible for long-life products
risk_notes: Unspecified materials reduce traceability and recycling confidence.
